name: @scow/user-sync
description: HTTP(JSON) gateway to MIS UserService for external sync (e.g. aix)

scripts.build: rimraf build && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && tsc-alias -p tsconfig.build.json
scripts.dev: dotenv -e env/.env.dev -- node -r ts-node/register -r tsconfig-paths/register --watch src/index.ts
